name: FortiWeb WAF
description: Fortinet FortiWeb Web Application Firewall REST API for managing server policies, protected hostnames, URL access rules, and security profiles

actions.name: List Server Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all server policies that define how traffic is inspected

actions.name: Get Server Policy
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific server policy

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Name of the server policy to retrieve

actions.name: List Protected Hostname Groups
actions.description: Retrieve all protected hostname groups used in server policies

actions.name: Create Protected Hostname Group
actions.description: Create a new protected hostname group for host header validation

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Hostname group definition including name and action (Allow/Deny)

actions.name: List URL Access Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all URL access policy rules for request filtering

actions.name: Create URL Access Rule
actions.description: Create a new URL access rule to allow or deny specific URL patterns

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: URL access rule including name, host pattern, URL pattern, and action

actions.name: List IP Lists
actions.description: Retrieve all IP access control lists (blocklists and allowlists)

actions.name: Add IP to Block List
actions.description: Add an IP address to a WAF IP block list

parameters.name: list_name
parameters.description: Name of the IP list to add the entry to

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: IP entry including type (Black-IP/Trust-IP), ip address, and severity

actions.name: Get Attack Logs
actions.description: Retrieve WAF attack detection logs and events

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of log entries to return

actions.name: List WAF Profiles
actions.description: Retrieve all WAF inline protection profiles
